creator: ralph@imada.sdu.dk
text:
Both "portupgrade -a" and "portmaster -a" are now broken

Trying to build graphviz fails with:
# cd /usr/ports/graphics/graphviz
# make config
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gnome.mk", line 643: Malformed conditional (${_USE_GNOME_ALL:Mpango}=="")
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk", line 6147: if-less endif
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

# make 
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gnome.mk", line 643: Malformed conditional (${_USE_GNOME_ALL:Mpango}=="")
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk", line 6147: if-less endif
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

How-To-Repeat: Try to build graphviz
